name: Peanut Butter Pinwheel Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening, p-nut butter, brown sugar, and eggs.
2. Sift in the flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix well until combined.
3. Divide the mixture into two halves. Roll each half out between layers of wax paper or saran wrap.
4. Melt 1/2 cup of semi-sweet morsels over hot water. Spread half of the melted chocolate over one half of the cookie dough.
5. Roll up the filled half tightly, then roll up the other half with chocolate and place it around the first roll. Wrap everything in wax paper or saran wrap.
6. Chill thoroughly for at least 30 minutes before baking.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Slice rounds from the rolled cookie using a sharp knife, placing them on an ungreased cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 8-12 minutes, or until lightly browned around the edges.
